title: Silence Redstone
description: A simple resource pack that silences all redstone sounds for a cleaner Minecraft experience.
body:
Silence Redstone is a clean, optimized, and carefully designed resource pack that focuses on making redstone components easier to Tolerate, understand, and use — without breaking the vanilla style of Minecraft.
Whether you are a beginner learning the basics of circuits or an advanced redstone engineer building massive contraptions, this pack gives you a smoother experience by improving redstone sounds across all redstone-related blocks and items.

✨ Key Features:



A balanced visual style that stays true to Minecraft’s vanilla aesthetics

Lightweight and fully optimized — no FPS drops.

Perfect for survival, creative, or technical builds.


🎮 Why Silence Redstone?
Because sometimes the smallest detail makes the biggest difference. By removing unnecessary noise and keeping everything clean, this pack lets you focus on building and experimenting with redstone in the most enjoyable way possible.

🛠️ Compatibility:

Designed for the latest versions of Minecraft (1.20+ / 1.21).

Works seamlessly with Fabric, Quilt, and Forge loaders.

Can be combined with shaders or other packs for a customized experience.


👤 Created with passion by AmirMiner.
